args.code: (() => { const searchBtn = document.querySelector('button[aria-label="Suche öffnen"]'); const onlineBtn = document.querySelector('button[aria-label="Online-Status"]'); const savedBtn = document.querySelector('.saved-section-btn'); const chatHeading = document.querySelector('h2, h3'); return {hasSearch: !!searchBtn, hasOnline: !!onlineBtn, hasSaved: !!savedBtn, chatHeading: chatHeading ? chatHeading.textContent.trim() : null}; })()
